entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: Service yetu hukuruhusu kuchapisha, kuunganisha, kuhifadhi, kushiriki, na vinginevyo kufanya zipatikane taarifa fulani, maandishi, michoro, video, au nyenzo nyingine (“Content”). Unawajibika kwa Content unayochapisha kwenye au kupitia Service, ikijumuisha uhalali wake, uaminifu wake, na ufaafu wake. Kwa kuchapisha Content kwenye au kupitia Service, unawakilisha na kuthibitisha kwamba: (i) Content ni yako (unaimiliki) na/au una haki ya kuitumia na haki ya kutupa haki na leseni kama ilivyoelezwa katika Terms hizi, na (ii) kuchapishwa kwa Content yako kwenye au kupitia Service hakukiuki haki za faragha, haki za umaarufu, hakimiliki, haki za mkataba, au haki nyingine yoyote ya mtu au taasisi yoyote. Tunahifadhi haki ya kusitisha akaunti ya mtu yeyote atakayepatikana anakiuka hakimiliki. Unabaki na haki zako zote kwa Content yoyote unayowasilisha, kuchapisha, au kuonyesha kwenye au kupitia Service na unawajibika kulinda haki hizo. Hatuchukui jukumu wala dhima kwa Content ambayo wewe au mhusika mwingine yeyote anachapisha kwenye au kupitia Service. Hata hivyo, kwa kuchapisha Content kwa kutumia Service unatupa haki na leseni ya kutumia, kubadilisha, kuigiza hadharani, kuonyesha hadharani, kuzalisha tena, na kusambaza Content hiyo kwenye na kupitia Service. Unakubali kwamba leseni hii inajumuisha haki yetu ya kufanya Content yako ipatikane kwa watumiaji wengine wa Service, ambao pia wanaweza kutumia Content yako chini ya Terms hizi. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ina haki lakini si wajibu wa kufuatilia na kuhariri Content yote inayotolewa na watumiaji. Aidha, Content inayopatikana kwenye au kupitia Service hii ni mali ya Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) au inatumika kwa ruhusa. Huruhusiwi kusambaza, kubadilisha, kutuma, kutumia tena, kupakua, kuchapisha upya, kunakili, au kutumia Content hiyo, iwe kwa ujumla au kwa sehemu, kwa madhumuni ya kibiashara au faida binafsi, bila ruhusa yetu ya maandishi ya mapema iliyo wazi.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.
entries.value: Service yetu inaweza kuwa na viungo kwenda tovuti nyingine ambazo haziendeshwi nasi. Ukibofya kiungo cha mhusika wa tatu, utaelekezwa kwenye tovuti ya mhusika huyo wa tatu. Tunakushauri kwa nguvu ukague Sera ya Faragha ya kila tovuti unayotembelea. Hatuchukui jukumu kwa maudhui, sera za faragha, au desturi za tovuti au huduma zozote za wahusika wengine.

We do not warrant the offerings of any of these entities/individuals or their websites. entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Wazazi mara nyingi hujaribu kusaidia bila kuchukua nafasi ya mwanafunzi. inspir huzipa familia hali za umma zinazofanya tabia ya kujifunza ionekane: vidokezo, maswali, kueleza tena, marudio, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Philosophy Lab ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: chunguza utambulisho, maarifa, haki, uhuru, furaha, na maswali mengine ya kina kupitia kufikiri kwa makini.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Philosophy Lab: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Philosophy Lab prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Philosophy Lab

entries.source: philosophy tutor AI
entries.value: AI ya mkufunzi wa falsafa

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Usanisinuru: mchakato ambao mimea hutumia kutengeneza chakula.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Chagua mada yoyote na ukabiliane na jaribio la maswali 10 ya kuchagua jibu sahihi. Unajibu swali moja kwa wakati, unapata mrejesho wa papo hapo, na unamaliza kwa kupata alama na mapitio.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Chagua mada yoyote na uingie kwenye mjadala wa ana kwa ana. Chagua upande, changamoto, na jifunze kutoa hoja bora zaidi.

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, then jump into the right public guest mode, starter prompt, study path, or guide without hunting through a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Chagua kazi ya kujifunza kwanza, kisha ruka kwenye hali sahihi ya umma ya mgeni, kidokezo cha kuanzia, njia ya masomo, au mwongozo bila kutafuta ndani ya chatbot ya jumla.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Fanya mazoezi ya kuhamisha uelewa. Omba tatizo linalofanana lenye namba, maneno, au muktadha tofauti.

entries.source: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Fanya mazoezi ya viva, mitihani ya mdomo, utetezi wa miradi, na maswali ya haraka ya kufuatilia kwa maoni tulivu.

entries.value: Mazoezi, si kunakili majibu

entries.value: Fanya mazoezi ya kulisema

entries.source: Predict grades and plan score targets
entries.value: Tabiri alama na panga malengo ya matokeo

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking for help.
entries.value: Tabiri msimbo au data inapaswa kufanya nini kabla ya kuomba msaada.

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking.
entries.value: Tabiri msimbo au data inapaswa kufanya nini kabla ya kuuliza.

entries.source: Predict, explain, test mentally or safely, and reflect on evidence.
entries.value: Tabiri, eleza, jaribu akilini au kwa usalama, na tafakari ushahidi.

entries.source: Prefer lesson blocks, maps, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, and concise coach prompts over free-form lecture.
entries.value: Pendelea vipande vya somo, ramani, uigaji, jozi za kulinganisha, rubriki, na vidokezo vifupi vya kocha kuliko mhadhara huru.

entries.source: Prepare a deep work session with a clear outcome, constraints, focus rules, review checkpoint, and fallback plan.
entries.value: Andaa kipindi cha kazi ya kina chenye matokeo wazi, vikwazo, sheria za umakini, hatua ya kukagua, na mpango mbadala.

entries.source: Prepare clear forum questions, replies, summaries, and follow-up requests that make student discussions more useful.
entries.value: Andaa maswali ya jukwaa yaliyo wazi, majibu, muhtasari, na maombi ya ufuatiliaji yanayofanya mijadala ya wanafunzi kuwa na manufaa zaidi.

entries.source: Prepare for an exam
entries.value: Jiandae kwa mtihani

entries.source: Prepare for an exam with active recall
entries.value: Jiandae kwa mtihani kwa kukumbuka kwa bidii

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning
entries.value: Jitayarishe kwa maswali ya mdomo

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning.
entries.value: Jiandae kwa maswali ya mdomo.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Jitayarishe kwa mahojiano ya shule, mafunzo ya kazi, ajira, au ufadhili wa masomo kwa maswali na maoni ya kweli.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: Waandae wanafunzi kwa mitihani ya mdomo kupitia maswali halisi.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Jitayarishe kwa hotuba, mawasilisho, usaili, au mitihani ya mdomo kwa kutumia vidokezo, muda, na maoni kuhusu muundo.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Andaa rasilimali za masomo kwa ajili ya wanafunzi wenzako au kikundi: muhtasari, viungo, madokezo, maelezo, na mwongozo wa matumizi.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Kozi zilizotayarishwa, video, na mazoezi huwa imara zaidi mwanafunzi anapojua mpangilio wa mada.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Wasilisha hoja, subiri jibu la kupinga, tambua maeneo dhaifu, na uimarishe mantiki ya mwanafunzi.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Wasilisha ushahidi, omba maamuzi, onyesha matokeo, na jadili kanuni baada ya tukio.

entries.source: Press facts
entries.value: Taarifa kwa waandishi

entries.source: Prioritize assignments
entries.value: Weka kipaumbele kwa kazi

entries.source: Prioritize by urgency and effort, break tasks down, and update status.
entries.value: Panga kwa dharura na juhudi, gawanya kazi, na sasisha hali.

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: Tanguliza mada

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Panga mada kwa vipaumbele.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Panga vipaumbele, ratibisha, ongeza mazoezi na marudio, kisha rekebisha kadri maendeleo yanavyobadilika.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Panga vipaumbele, punguza kazi kubwa kupita kiasi, fuatilia maendeleo, na malizia kwa marudio.

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: URL za gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa hazijaorodheshwa kwenye sitemap na hazijajumuishwa katika llms.txt, llms-full.txt, au katalogi ya maudhui ya AI ya JSON.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Ufundishaji binafsi una nguvu, lakini haupatikani kwa usawa. Jukwaa la umma la kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo linaweza kusaidia kupunguza pengo hilo la ufikiaji kwa kuwapa watu wengi zaidi sehemu ya kwanza yenye subira ya kujifunza.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Ufundishaji binafsi una nguvu, lakini unasambazwa kwa kutokuwa sawa. inspir hutumia AI kupanua ufikiaji huku ikimuweka mwanafunzi hai: vidokezo kabla ya majibu, maswali kabla ya mihadhara, na mazoezi baada ya maelezo.

entries.source: Project Coach
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa Mradi

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Project Coach ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: panga mradi wa shule, ubunifu, usimbaji, au binafsi kwa wigo, hatua muhimu, vizuizi, na hatua zinazofuata.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Project Coach: mwongozo wa vitendo
